designSystem.style: Dark productivity UI with glowing accent indicators, card-based layout, and data-dense information hierarchy. Clean, focused aesthetic inspired by developer tools and focus apps. Uses subtle gradients and border glows to signal state and priority.

screens: Snapshots — list of paused tasks with next-action cards, filter pills, and resume detail view with context/decisions/files tabs
Capture — quick input with mode switcher (text, voice, screenshot, link), interruption detection banner, and recent captures list
Focus Windows — timeline visualization of available focus gaps with expandable windows matched to real tasks
Insights — interruption pattern stats, daily heatmap, top interrupt sources bar chart, and personalized weekly insight with action CTA
keyInteractions: Tap snapshot card to open full resume detail
Expand focus windows to see matched tasks
Accordion-style window expansion with suggested tasks
